name: task-worker
description: Provider-neutral work graphs with manual/worker dispatch, parallel ready sets, integration gates, pinned evidence, and cross-session resume.

interface.shortDescription: Decompose, run, and verify provider-neutral work graphs.
interface.longDescription: Defines immutable work graphs, plans every ready leaf and integration candidate from local or provider snapshots, isolates local runs in stable worktrees, and records digest-pinned verification evidence. Persistent aliases support cross-session resume, while manual dispatch exposes the same ready set without creating local runs. GitHub, Studio, wiki, and review providers remain optional adapters.
defaultPrompt: Use $define to create or revise an immutable provider-neutral work graph.
Use dispatch: manual to expose the ready set without local runs, or dispatch: worker to execute it.
Use $orchestrate to dispatch every ready leaf in parallel-safe worktrees while preserving integration gates.
Resume by definition, wiki task, or provider alias and reuse only digest-valid verification evidence.
